
### better data-flow 



::: {.r-stack .my-full}
![](/ooo/texfig/dataFlowMult.figure-1.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=1}

![](/ooo/texfig/dataFlowMult.figure-2.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=2}

![](/ooo/texfig/dataFlowMult.figure-3.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=3}


:::
